events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Peace and love! The legendary Ringo Starr is 86 today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring the man himself on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to astrophysics, a true legend. What's your top Queen guitar moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track that perfectly captures his legendary energy?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played. Remember watching it for the first time?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place in 1969, featuring iconic performances from Jimi Hendrix, Janis Joplin, and many more.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock brought three days of peace and music. What's the one performance you wish you could have seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: This day marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: This day marks the anniversary of the death of rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Tupac Shakur, who left us too soon in 1996. He would have been 55. His lyrics still resonate today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: This day marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84. A true guitar visionary.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks – what’s your favourite from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the phenomenal Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever. What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite lyric or tune from the man himself? As you were.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 51 today. A timeless message of peace and hope that still resonates. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. Remember your first one? How many songs did it hold?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite Bond film or moment? Licence to thrill!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: This day marks the birthday of John Lennon, who would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. A true visionary whose music and message continue to inspire.
